title: Validation Result / Gate Report
description: The result of a single gate layer over a content item (spec §7.2). Union contract: downstream verdicts MUST carry forward every deterministic detection; an LLM layer may add codes but never drop one (DD-3).

content_id.description: The content item this result is for.

stage.description: Which gate layer produced this result.

detected_codes.description: All failure codes detected at this stage. Each carries forward unchanged into downstream layers (union contract, DD-3).

family.description: Namespaced family the code belongs to (spec §10.2).

rule_ref.description: Id of the rule that defines this code (registry/rule contract, spec §10.1).

disposition.description: Consequence of the code (DD-20; hard ⇒ block).

correction_record.description: Optional record of an applied correction when disposition is 'correct'.

bars_recommended.description: Whether this code bars the affected variant from being the Recommended pick (§14.4).

scores.description: Rubric score block produced by this stage (free-form rubric keys; see scores-log for the canonical aggregate row).
